name: Oscillating Bracelet
descs:
When hitting an enemy with a Skill, inflict 1 [Vibration] Potency next turn.

If the Skill's Affinity was Wrath, inflict 2 [Vibration] Potency instead.

When hitting an enemy with a Skill, inflict 1 [Vibration] Potency next turn.

If the Skill's Affinity was Wrath, inflict 3 [Vibration] Potency instead.

When hitting an enemy with a Skill, inflict 2 [Vibration] Potency next turn.

If the Skill's Affinity was Wrath, inflict 4 [Vibration] Potency instead.
